title: CLI Docs Final Check
findings: NEW: root `fabric --help` grouped renderer hardcodes command groups in packages/cli/src/lib/grouped-help.ts:29-75 and omits public `uninstall`, while runtime registry includes it at packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts:21 and docs list it as public at packages/cli/README.md:12. Distinct from existing test-coverage drift issues: this is user-visible root help omission.
